logo_choice.rationale: Single header inline-SVG with 9 paths and the canonical 137:36 wordmark aspect ratio — no ambiguity, no Round 1 needed.

palette_anchor.rationale: Black is the dominant chord (331 occurrences vs anything else) and stone-beige is the signature warm neutral the L'Oréal corporate site uses to lift B/W into luxury beauty — no Round 2 needed.

font_fallback.rationale: User picked Cormorant Garamond + Inter as open-source proxies for Halesworth + HelveticaNowDisplay.

slide_emphasis.rationale: User selected the three slide types that most directly mirror L'Oréal's editorial register: oversized italic pullquote, full-bleed art-directed photography, and parallel narrative columns for mission/heritage.
